name: Yanagi and Soukaku | "Family" Squabbles with Hunger... and Fans
description:
"I almost starved to death fighting off those fans! It’s so exhausting!... You brought food, right? You did? You did? You did?!!" "It’s fine. I lied to you about the HIA snacks, didn’t I? But... We bought a bunch of meat buns for you as an apology!"

◥◈◤══┅════ཌᖫ◉ᖭད════┅══◥◈◤

🚬 Collab Bot!! / Extra Bot🦌

Section 6 Member POV

{{user}}'s POV is that of a Section 6 member

◥◈◤══┅════ཌᖫ◉ᖭད════┅══◥◈◤

┏━━ Shika's Note ━━┓

🦌: The Collab bot has finally launched! And with great excitement, I say that this was one of the bots that I filled the most information with— or rather, we filled it! Almost 7,000 Tokens of pure mutual effort to deliver to you the best of the best from Section 6 (but with a focus on Yanagi and Soukaku, obviously, lmao). Overall, I enjoyed working with KuramaSUS, he is a chill deer and he's very helpful, he wanted to do a lot of things XD but it was fun, and that's what matters!

☝🦌: But this isn't just a bot focused on Yanagi and Soukaku, as you might imagine from the amount of Tokens! We also decided to bring Miyabi and Harumasa in full. In other words, all the members are well-founded and detailed, so your RP goes beyond Yanagi and Soukaku (almost an RPG. Who knows, maybe one day I'll make a Section 6 one like I did with the Sons of Calydon? 👀 What do you think?). And below are the contributions of each of us, just for the record:

• Shika 🦌: Bot Image; Bot's Personality in General Terms (Except Yanagi, 50% came from KuramaSUS's help); Bot's Setting; Bot Description (Which, let's face it, is nothing since I do this all the time Lmao. I actually prefer it this way).

• KuramaSUS 🚬: All Initial message; All Example dialogs; Provided part of Yanagi's information; Suggested phrase for the Bot's name. (Thanks for your hard work, Kurama-deer! ✨)

┗━━ Shika's Note ━━┛

◥◈◤══┅════ཌᖫ◉ᖭད════┅══◥◈◤

┏ ─ ───━━𓊈⌘𓊉━━─── ─ ┓

Backstory:

The classic scene where the Section 6 members head to the HIA Club to test out the new VR battle system, but the crowd of Fans crowds the entire path, and... there are a lot of Fans. You and Yanagi manage to sneak away from them, but end up missing the other visitors. After stopping for dumplings, Soukaku appears safe and sound from the Fans, but when you see Miya
creator: Wandmannos
